description: The Amazon Basics Vanity Mirror is a double-sided tabletop mirror with a heavy base, measuring 15 x 9.02 x 7.01 inches and weighing 3 pounds. It features 1x and 5x magnification, a 360-degree rotating design, and durable iron-coated construction in a white finish. The 6.69-inch diameter mirror provides crystal clear reflection for makeup application, skincare, and grooming. Its sturdy base prevents tipping for stable use.
